United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Golf Life
programme.desc: Golf tips, equipment reviews and golf course features.

programme.title: Best of Devils
programme.desc: From Jan. 23, 2026.

programme.title: Best of Devils
programme.desc: From Jan. 29, 2026.

programme.title: Best of Devils
programme.desc: From Feb. 28, 2026.

programme.title: 4th & Forever
programme.desc: A portrait of different American communities coming together in order to help its youth succeed in the face of adversity.

programme.title: Poker
programme.desc: Poker action from tournaments around the world.

programme.title: Tennis
programme.desc: From Dec. 8, 2025.

programme.title: The Match
programme.desc: All the action as Liverpool take on Atalanta.

programme.title: Alisson: My Story
programme.desc: In this LFC Originals exclusive, we visit the childhood home of Alisson Becker and discover the story of his first steps towards becoming one of the world¿s finest goalkeepers.

programme.title: Alisson: My Story
programme.desc: We are in Rome for the second part of our exclusive documentary, learning how Alisson fought to establish himself in the Italian capital and in Jürgen Klopp¿s Liverpool plans.

programme.title: Alisson: My Story
programme.desc: In the final part of our story, we experience the incredible highs and devastating lows on and off the pitch as Alisson becomes a Reds legend and makes Liverpool his home.

programme.title: Goal Rush
programme.desc: A collection of the best Liverpool goals scored by Diogo Jota.

programme.title: Robbo: My Liverpool
programme.desc: A brand-new, exclusive LFC Original documentary paying tribute to Andy Robertson and his remarkable nine-year journey at Liverpool.

programme.title: Champions 24/25: The Inside Story
programme.desc: With exclusive interviews from first team players and Arne Slot, this is how Liverpool claimed an historic 20th league title.

programme.title: The Match
programme.desc: The best of the action as Liverpool take on Arsenal.

programme.title: Salah: Farewell to The King
programme.desc: An exclusive LFC Original documentary celebrating Mohamed Salah¿s extraordinary legacy at Liverpool.

programme.title: Robbo: My Liverpool
programme.desc: A brand-new, exclusive LFC Original documentary paying tribute to Andy Robertson and his remarkable nine-year journey at Liverpool.

programme.title: Rugby Junior World Championships
programme.desc: Australia U20 v Fiji U20.

programme.title: NHL Tonight
programme.desc: Enjoy all the highlights from the previous evening's NHL action and stay informed with comprehensive post-game analysis, scores, interviews and breaking news.

programme.title: Swedish Speedway
programme.desc: Piraterna v Indianerna.

programme.title: Rugby Junior World Championships
programme.desc: England U20 v USA U20.

programme.title: Premier Sports Cup
programme.desc: Celtic v Rangers. Action from the semi-final match at Hampden Park.

programme.title: Premier Sports Cup
programme.desc: St. Mirren v Celtic in the final.

programme.title: NHL Tonight
programme.desc: Whip around through live look-ins, real-time scores, breaking news and expert analysis with the studio hosts and seasoned NHL veterans. Stay on top of all the action around the league with NHL Tonight.

programme.title: Hockey
programme.desc: Gold Medal.

programme.title: 2025 IIHF Women's World Championship
programme.desc: Final 1-2.

programme.title: 2025 IIHF World Championship
programme.desc: Gold Medal Game.

programme.title: A Day That Changed The Game Feb. 22, 1980: Miracle on Ice
programme.desc: The Miracle on Ice - looking back at the 1980 Olympics and how the United States did the impossible, and knocked off the mighty Soviet Union.

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: Hear Better With Audien
programme.desc: Audien Hearing is a leader in over-the-counter hearing aids, committed to making high-quality hearing accessible to all. Discover how advanced, affordable solutions are helping more people experience better hearing every day.

programme.title: Pain Relief Revealed
programme.desc: Discover the hidden story of OmegaXL with John Walsh. He dives deep into the groundbreaking supplement that promises hope and relief for millions battling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: World Tennis With Harry Cicma
programme.desc: Featuring exclusive interviews and features with the biggest names in tennis.

programme.title: Fair Territory with Ken Rosenthal
programme.desc: MLB insider Ken Rosenthal covers baseball's latest news and pressing issues.

programme.title: Diggin' Deep
programme.desc: In-depth interviews with former and current MLB players, coaches, and executives.

programme.title: Red Sox: On This Day
programme.desc: From 2008. Jon Lester throws a complete game shutout of the rival Yankees adding in eight strikeouts. Jacoby Ellsbury and Mike Lowell set the pace offensively with 2 RBIs each.

programme.title: Live: Boston's Entered the Chat
programme.desc: A daily show featuring conversational debate that sets up the day in Boston sports. The format incorporates social media and timely guests to inform and entertain fans of New England sports teams.

programme.title: Red Sox Almanac
programme.desc: A look back at the 1994 Red Sox season, a season cut short by the MLB strike on August 12th, becoming the first year without a champion since 1904. The Red Sox finished 54-61 led by Scott Cooper and franchise players Mo Vaughn and Roger Clemens.

programme.title: Red Sox Report
programme.desc: An inside look at the 2026 Red Sox Hall of Fame Ceremony, inducting Jon Lester, Johnny Damon, Mike Timlin, and Sherm Feller into the Red Sox Hall of Fame alongside Bill Mueller's Memorable Moment with his walk-off home run against the Yankees.

programme.title: Boston's Entered the Chat
programme.desc: A daily show featuring conversational debate that sets up the day in Boston sports. The format incorporates social media and timely guests to inform and entertain fans of New England sports teams.

programme.title: Best of Rangers
programme.desc: From March 31, 2026.

programme.title: Diggin' Deep
programme.desc: In-depth interviews with former and current MLB players, coaches, and executives.

programme.title: Best of Rangers
programme.desc: From April 15, 2026.

programme.title: New York Knicks 2026 Championship Parade
programme.desc: Fans celebrate the New York Knicks' first NBA Championship in 53 years with a ticker-tape parade through the city's "Canyon of Heroes.".

programme.title: TBL Team Boxing League
programme.desc: Professional boxing with team's fighters competing in individual one round contests.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: In a classic game-show version of "Hangman," contestants solve word puzzles for cash and prizes.

programme.title: The $100,000 Pyramid
programme.desc: Celebrity contestants Nico Santos, Lauren Ash, Nicole Byer and Jermaine Fowler.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: In a classic game-show version of "Hangman," contestants solve word puzzles for cash and prizes.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: The Emmy-winning quiz show features a unique answer-and-question format.

programme.title: Master Minds
programme.desc: Three challengers take on some of the great minds in trivia in a showdown of smarts and strategy; the last contestant standing will face off against the highest scoring Master Mind in a head-to-head battle.

programme.title: The Perfect Line
programme.desc: Players Jenn, Jeffrey, Deidra and Noelle.

programme.title: Flip Side
programme.desc: Tyler and Alma jump into a battle with Britt and Bryant.

programme.title: Chain Reaction
programme.desc: "Chain Reaction" is back with fan-favorite Dylan Lane returning as host of the popular word puzzle game in which players compete to form chains composed of two-word phrases.

programme.title: America Says
programme.desc: John Michael Higgins hosts as two teams of friends race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Buzzy "The Stunner" Cohen makes his debut as chaser; Cohen faces off in a trivia battle against a stay-at-home mom, a federal employee and a copywriter.

programme.title: The Wall
programme.desc: Teams of two everyday people battle trivia questions and a 40-foot wall for the chance to win millions of dollars. Part smarts, part luck and part guts, their victory is as unpredictable as the bounce of the ball.

programme.title: SIGN OFF
programme.desc: Sign off.

programme.title: Live: DP World Tour Golf
programme.desc: From Golfclub Munchen Eichenried in Munich.

programme.title: Playing Lessons From the Pros
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy joins Brandel Chamblee on the course to share his thoughts, strategies, and overall course management in part one of this two-part episode.

programme.title: Playing Lessons From the Pros
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy joins Brandel Chamblee on the course to share his thoughts, strategies, and overall course management in part two of this two-part episode. Rory shares his pre-round putting routine and goes in-depth on his green reading process.

programme.title: Playing Lessons From the Pros
programme.desc: Bones takes on the role of caddie for YouTube sensation Rick Shiels, giving viewers an inside look at the strategies used by major champions. Rick gets in-depth advice for a variety of shots, and he gives insight on how to build confidence.

programme.title: The Next Shot
programme.desc: GolfPass coach Nathalie Sheehan has put together a practice plan using other popular sports to lower your golf scores.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Nine-time U.S. Ryder Cup team member Jim Furyk breaks down the keys to a successful chip and pitch.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Considered one of golf's best putters, Jim Furyk shares tips with host Michael Breed.

programme.title: DP World Tour Golf
programme.desc: From Golfclub Munchen Eichenried in Munich.

programme.title: Live: Golf Central Pregame
programme.desc: Golf Central Pregame preps viewers for all the tournament action, with up-to-date scores, interviews, and analysis.

programme.title: Live: PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: From TPC Deere Run in Silvis, Ill.

programme.title: Golf Central
programme.desc: Golf Channel's flagship news program, the nightly "Golf Central" presents highlights from the major golf tours and world events, plus reports and features from tournament sites.

programme.title: PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: From TPC Deere Run in Silvis, Ill.

programme.title: Blackhawks Podcast
programme.desc: An inside look at the Chicago Blackhawks, as Pat Boyle and Charlie Roumeliotis deliver the latest news, interviews, and behind-the-scenes updates throughout the season.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Chicago White Sox and Cleveland Guardians begin their four-game series at Progressive Field. The White Sox lead the season series, 2-1. Davis Martin is the expected starter for Chicago against Slade Cecconi, the expected starter for Cleveland.

programme.title: Pro Football Weekly TV Podcast
programme.desc: The best coverage in the NFL means fantasy football tips, rumors, buzz, predictions, NFL debates and the best NFL Draft coverage in the business.

programme.desc: The Chicago White Sox and Cleveland Guardians begin their four-game series at Progressive Field. The White Sox lead the season series, 2-1. Davis Martin is the expected starter for Chicago against Slade Cecconi, the expected starter for Cleveland.

programme.title: Live: The Chicago Lead
programme.desc: Providing Chicago sports fans breaking news, analysis, features, and exclusive interviews and insights across the region's most relevant professional, collegiate, and high school sports stories and personalities.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: From Progressive Field in Cleveland.

programme.title: Live: B1G Today
programme.desc: Dave Revsine breaks down the biggest stories of the day from around the Big Ten. Hear from B1G analysts, coaches, players and more as they discuss a range of sports topics.

programme.desc: Dave Revsine breaks down the biggest stories of the day from around the Big Ten. Hear from B1G analysts, coaches, players and more as they discuss a range of sports topics.

programme.title: On the Pitch
programme.desc: Hear from Michigan State's Brandon Munson. Michele Dalton returns home to Wisconsin. See how Julia and Grace Raich inspire inclusion at Penn State. Meet Ohio State's Jacinda and Jadin Bonham.

programme.title: B1G Today
programme.desc: Dave Revsine breaks down the biggest stories of the day from around the Big Ten. Hear from B1G analysts, coaches, players and more as they discuss a range of sports topics.

programme.title: UCLA Soccer Classic
programme.desc: Sergi Solans scored three goals in 4th-seeded UCLA's victory over 3rd-seeded Michigan to capture the program's first-ever Big Ten Tournament title. From Nov. 16, 2025.

programme.desc: Dave Revsine breaks down the biggest stories of the day from around the Big Ten. Hear from B1G analysts, coaches, players and more as they discuss a range of sports topics.

programme.desc: From Nov. 3, 2017.

programme.title: Washington Soccer Classic
programme.desc: The 13th-ranked Huskies clinched the Big Ten Tournament Championship on a penalty shootout victory with the help of Tanner Ijams' six saves. From Nov. 9, 2025.

programme.desc: Dave Revsine breaks down the biggest stories of the day from around the Big Ten. Hear from B1G analysts, coaches, players and more as they discuss a range of sports topics.

programme.title: 2026 NCAA Women's Basketball Tournament
programme.desc: Women's college basketball teams vie for the NCAA Tournament title.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: The Fighting Irish host the Tigers in this SEC/ACC Challenge outing. Notre Dame is 5-3 after going 1-2 at the Players Era Festival in Las Vegas. Missouri is 8-0 for the second time in four seasons. Markus Burton (ND) averages 20.1 points per game.
